name: Pecan Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop 1/2 cup pecans and set aside the remaining pecan halves for garnish.
2. In a large bowl, combine chopped pecans with the remaining ingredients. Knead until the mixture holds together.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Place half of the dough between two sheets of waxed paper, about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Using an 2-inch flower-shaped cookie cutter, cut out rounds from the dough.
6. Place each round onto an ungreased cookie sheet, leaving about 1 inch (2.5 cm) apart.
7. Press a reserved pecan half into each cookie.
8. Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the cookie sheet before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Repeat with the remaining dough, trimmings, and pecans. Store the cookies in tightly covered containers.
